briefdescription.para: Invalid event (only for an internal evaluation)
VsCamDevice FuSa CRC (Cyclic redundancy check) level.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* CamDeviceEventFunc_t)(const CamDeviceEventId_t evtId, CamDeviceFuSaMisVal_t *param, void *pUserContext)
memberdef.name: CamDeviceEventFunc_t

briefdescription.para: VsCamDevice FuSa event callback function pointer.
VsCamDevice FuSa CRC (Cyclic redundancy check) level.
VsCamDevice FuSa BIST (Built in self test) size.
